app.name: GitHub Webhooks .NET Processor
app.one_liner: A .NET library for efficiently handling GitHub webhook events with integrations for ASP.NET Core and Azure Functions.

screens.name: Webhook Event Handler Setup
screens.purpose: Configure and implement custom logic for processing specific GitHub webhook events such as pull requests or issues.
primary_actions: Register custom processor in DI container

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist processed webhook event data (not directly implemented; illustrative command based on issue-reported performance concerns).

mvp_plan: week 1: Configure endpoint path and secret validation
acceptance_tests: Confirms PullRequestEvent is deserialized and dispatched to ProcessPullRequestWebhookAsync without double-parsing.
Validates that webhook signature verification correctly rejects tampered payloads.
